rule_hits.summary: Lists references cited in the paper, covering a range of topics from information retrieval techniques to large language models and related research.
Describes the query2doc method, which uses few-shot prompting to generate pseudo-documents from LLMs. Details the process for sparse and dense retrieval, including concatenation...
Details the experimental setup and main results, showing significant improvements in both in-domain and out-of-domain retrieval tasks when using query2doc with BM25 and dense re...
Reviews query expansion and document expansion techniques, emphasizing the unique contributions of leveraging LLMs for query expansion and comparing with related work like HyDE...
